description: Your clipboard, but Claude can read it. Type-classified, secret-encrypted. macOS + Linux.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint not provided and registryType='mcpb' not in the inference table)

name: io.github.d-khomenko/clipboard-history-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Auto-mirror non-secret clips to this Obsidian vault directory. Sidecar `.md` per clip + bullet in `daily/YYYY-MM-DD.md`. Secrets are never mirrored.
environmentVariables.name: CLIPBOARD_VAULT_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Set to '1' to capture the active window title alongside each clip (needs Accessibility permission on macOS, X11 only on Linux).
environmentVariables.name: CLIPBOARD_CAPTURE_WINDOW_TITLE

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated app display names to skip (e.g. '1Password,Bitwarden,KeePassXC').
environmentVariables.name: CLIPBOARD_IGNORE_APPS

environmentVariables.description: Set to '1' for paranoid mode — secrets are detected and metadata-logged but ciphertext is never stored.
environmentVariables.name: CLIPBOARD_NEVER_STORE_SECRETS

environmentVariables.description: Maximum number of clips kept in the ring buffer. Defaults to 1000.
environmentVariables.name: CLIPBOARD_HISTORY_MAX

environmentVariables.description: Watcher poll interval in milliseconds. Defaults to 1500.
environmentVariables.name: CLIPBOARD_POLL_MS

title: Clipboard History MCP
